steps.title: Use the total to find the missing cell
steps.content:
From the table: males who play = 312, females who play = 220, females who don't play = 216. Since all 1,000 students must be accounted for, males who don't play equals the total minus the three known cell values:
$$1,000 - (312 + 220 + 216) = 1,000 - 748 = 252$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
